extraSources.name: Study in Norway — Cost and requirements

requirements.label: Admission to an approved institution
requirements.detail: Full-time admission to an accredited Norwegian higher-education institution.

requirements.label: Funds requirement
requirements.detail: Show about NOK 151,690 for the year (set annually by UDI), often deposited into a Norwegian student account or the institution's deposit account.

requirements.label: Housing
requirements.detail: Evidence of where you'll live in Norway is part of the application.

requirements.label: Health insurance / membership
requirements.detail: Coverage arrangements depend on study length; longer stays join the national scheme.

requirements.label: English language proof
requirements.detail: IELTS/TOEFL as your programme requires for English-taught study.

requirements.label: Valid passport
requirements.detail: A passport valid for the study-permit period.

requirements.label: Tuition / funds transfer
requirements.detail: Transfer the funds requirement or tuition with a low-FX provider.

requirements.label: Connectivity on arrival
requirements.detail: An eSIM gives you a Norwegian number and data on landing.
